query: What is the maximum capacity threshold for a  generator in MISO to be eligible for the fast-track interconnection process in MISO, according to MISO Tariff Attachment X Generator Interconnection Procedures (GIP)? Cite the relevant source report and section for your answer
final_answer:
The maximum capacity threshold is **5 MW**.

**Source and section:** MISO, **Attachment X – FERC Electric Tariff, Generator Interconnection Procedures (GIP)**, effective January 31, 2025, **Section 1, Definitions**. The tariff defines the **“Fast Track Process”** as the procedure for evaluating an Interconnection Request for a **certified Small Generating Facility “no larger than five MW”** that includes the Section 14 screen, customer options meeting, and optional supplemental review. The same section defines a **“Small Generating Facility”** as having aggregate net Generating Facility Capacity of **no more than five MW** and meeting the requirements of **Section 14 and Appendix 3**. Source: MISO Attachment X GIP PDF, Section 1, Definitions: https://cdn.misoenergy.org/Attachment%20X%20-%20GIP%20(Effective%20January%2031%202025)330116.pdf
